channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [CHEMFABALKA] Chemfab Alkalis: ₹1.25 Dividend Approved; Auditor Re-appointed
item.description:
Chemfab Alkalis Ltd's board approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. A final dividend of ₹1.25 per share was recommended for shareholder approval. M/s. Madhavan, Mohan & Associates were re-appointed as Cost Auditors, and M/s. Brahmayya & Co, Chartered Accountants, were appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-2027.

  • Audited financial results for FY26 approved with unmodified opinion.
  • Final dividend of ₹1.25 per share recommended.
  • M/s. Madhavan, Mohan & Associates re-appointed as Cost Auditors.
  • M/s. Brahmayya & Co appointed as Internal Auditors for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Chemfab Alkalis Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NILACHAL] Nilachal Refractories EGM to Approve Asset Sale
item.description:
Nilachal Refractories Ltd will hold an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting on May 18, 2026, to seek shareholder approval for the sale/transfer/disposal of the company's undertaking under Section 180(1)(a) of the Companies Act, 2013. The meeting will also address the approval for material related party transactions as per SEBI regulations and the Companies Act, 2013, with a transaction limit of ₹2 Crores per related party and ₹8 Crores in aggregate.

  • EGM scheduled for May 18, 2026, to approve the sale/transfer of the company's undertaking.
  • Shareholder approval sought under Section 180(1)(a) of the Companies Act, 2013.
  • Approval for material related party transactions is on the agenda.
  • Transaction limits proposed at ₹2 Crores per related party and ₹8 Crores in aggregate.
  • Board authorized to finalize terms and execute agreements for the proposed transactions.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NILACHAL REFRACTORIES LTD. | Category: AGM/EGM

item.title: [CYBERTECH] CyberTech: FY26 Results, ₹14.45 Cr Buyback, ₹4 Dividend
item.description:
🔥 Trending

CyberTech Systems and Software Ltd's board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. They recommended a final dividend of ₹4 per share, subject to shareholder approval. A buyback of up to 8,50,000 equity shares at ₹170 per share, totaling ₹14.45 Cr, was approved, representing 2.73% of total equity. Desai Associates were appointed as Internal Auditors for FY 2026-27.

  • CyberTech approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • A final dividend of ₹4 per share was recommended for FY26.
  • Buyback of 8,50,000 shares at ₹170 per share approved, totaling ₹14.45 Cr.
  • Desai Associates appointed as Internal Auditors for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CYBERTECH SYSTEMS AND SOFTWARE LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [QPOWER] Quality Power FY26 Revenue Up 156.9% to ₹10,070 Mn
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd announced its FY26 financial results, reporting a 156.9% YoY increase in revenue to ₹10,070 Mn. EBITDA also saw significant growth, rising by 97.8% YoY to ₹2,362 Mn. The company's order book exceeds ₹14,000 Mn, representing approximately 1.4x of FY26 revenue. Q4 FY26 revenue stood at ₹3,098 Mn, up 138.5% YoY, while EBITDA was ₹593 Mn, a 56.5% increase YoY.

  • FY26 revenue reached ₹10,070 Mn, a 156.9% YoY increase.
  • FY26 EBITDA grew by 97.8% YoY to ₹2,362 Mn.
  • Order book exceeds ₹14,000 Mn, approximately 1.4x FY26 revenue.
  • Q4 FY26 revenue increased by 138.5% YoY to ₹3,098 Mn.
  • Q4 FY26 EBITDA rose by 56.5% YoY to ₹593 Mn.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Quality Power Electrical Equipments Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [GUJCOTEX] Gujarat Cotex Allots 8.06 Cr Equity Shares via Rights Issue
item.description:
Gujarat Cotex Ltd's board approved the allotment of 8,06,89,241 fully paid-up equity shares with a face value of ₹5 each, issued on a rights basis to eligible shareholders at ₹5 per share. This allotment, finalized in consultation with the Registrar and approved by BSE, increases the company's paid-up equity share capital from ₹7,12,20,000 to ₹47,46,66,205.

  • Gujarat Cotex allots 8,06,89,241 equity shares via rights issue.
  • Shares allotted at ₹5 each, face value of ₹5.
  • Post-allotment, paid-up equity capital increases to ₹47,46,66,205.
  • BSE approved the allotment in consultation with the Registrar.
  • Rights Issue opened on 10/04/2026 and closed on 08/05/2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT COTEX LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [CYBERTECH] CyberTech: Approves ₹14.45 Cr Buyback at ₹170/Share
item.description:
🔥 Trending

CyberTech Systems and Software Ltd's board approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of ₹4 per equity share. They also approved the appointment of Desai Associates as internal auditors for FY27. A buyback of up to 8,50,000 equity shares at ₹170 per share, totaling ₹14.45 Crores, was approved, representing 2.73% of the total paid-up equity share capital. Saffron Capital Advisors Private Limited is appointed as the Merchant Banker for the buyback.

  • CyberTech approves audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Final dividend of ₹4 per equity share recommended, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Buyback of up to 8,50,000 shares at ₹170 per share approved, totaling ₹14.45 Cr.
  • Desai Associates appointed as Internal Auditors for the financial year 2026-27.
  • Saffron Capital Advisors Private Limited appointed as Merchant Banker for buyback.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: CYBERTECH SYSTEMS AND SOFTWARE LTD. | Category: Buyback

item.title: [GUJCOTEX] Gujarat Cotex Allots 8.06 Cr Shares via Rights Issue
item.description:
Gujarat Cotex Ltd has allotted 8,06,89,241 fully paid-up equity shares of face value ₹5 each at a price of ₹5 per share to eligible shareholders and renouncees, following its Rights Issue which opened on April 10, 2026, and closed on May 8, 2026. The allotment was approved by the Board of Directors on May 13, 2026, in consultation with the Registrar and BSE Limited. This allotment increases the company's paid-up equity share capital from ₹7,12,20,000 to ₹47,46,66,205.

  • Gujarat Cotex allots 8,06,89,241 equity shares via Rights Issue.
  • Issue price was ₹5 per share, face value ₹5 per share.
  • Post-allotment, paid-up equity share capital increases to ₹47,46,66,205.
  • Rights Issue opened on 10/04/2026 and closed on 08/05/2026.
  • Allotment approved by the Board on May 13, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GUJARAT COTEX LTD. | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [CHEMFABALKA] Chemfab Alkalis Recommends ₹1.25 Dividend
item.description:
Chemfab Alkalis Ltd's board approved recommending a dividend of ₹1.25 per equity share to shareholders during its meeting on May 13, 2026. The board also approved the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. Additionally, the reappointment of M/s. Madhavan, Mohan & Associates as cost auditor and the appointment of M/s. Brahmayya & Co as internal auditors for FY 2026-2027 were approved.

  • Chemfab Alkalis recommends a dividend of ₹1.25 per share.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 were approved by the board.
  • M/s. Madhavan, Mohan & Associates reappointed as cost auditor.
  • M/s. Brahmayya & Co appointed as internal auditor for FY27.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Chemfab Alkalis Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [BHARTIARTL] Bharti Airtel: Unmodified Opinion on FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
Bharti Airtel Ltd. has declared that Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP, the company's statutory auditors, have issued audit reports with an unmodified opinion on the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the fourth quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. This declaration, made by CFO Akhil Garg, complies with Regulation 33(3)(d) of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Bharti Airtel confirms unmodified audit opinion for FY26 results.
  • Deloitte Haskins & Sells LLP issued the audit reports.
  • Declaration complies with SEBI regulations.
  • Results are for Q4 and year ended March 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARTI AIRTEL LTD. | Category: Auditor

item.title: [NITCO] Nitco Modifies Kanjurmarg Land Monetization Terms
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Nitco Ltd's board approved modifications to the proposed monetization of land at Kanjurmarg, Mumbai, previously approved by shareholders on July 17, 2024. Due to the transaction not materializing, Nitco is in discussions with the purchaser, M/s. R Siddhatva Developers Private Limited, a step-down subsidiary of M/s. Runwal Construction Private Limited, to execute conveyance deeds and agreements on similar terms. An advance of ₹143 Crores is appropriated against the monetization of 75% of the land, with the balance 25% monetized against an increased area share. Completion of 75% of the sale is expected in four months, and the remaining 25% within one year after regulatory approvals.

  • Nitco modifies terms for Kanjurmarg land monetization with R Siddhatva Developers.
  • Shareholders previously approved the monetization on July 17, 2024.
  • ₹143 Crores advance is allocated to 75% of the land monetization.
  • Balance 25% to be monetized against increased area share in the project.
  • 75% sale completion expected in four months, remaining in one year post approvals.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NITCO LTD. | Category: Business Update
